name: Suspicious Logon
aql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE username = 'admin' AND sourceip != '10.0.0.1' LAST 15 MINUTES

name: Multiple Failed Logins
enabled: username FROM events WHERE eventname LIKE '%failed%' LAST 10 MINUTES GROUP BY username HAVING fail_count > 5
throttle_window: Multiple failed logins per user in 10m

name: Outbound to Rare Country
aql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE destinationip IN ('203.0.113.10'
throttle_window: Outbound traffic to rare IPs in 60m

name: Regex Match Example
aql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE url matches '.*(/wp-admin|/xmlrpc)\b.*' LAST 5 MINUTES
